name: agent-bridge
description: Persistent session bridge from MCP clients to local OMP and Codex agents.

interface.shortDescription: Use persistent OMP and Codex sessions from Codex
interface.longDescription: Agent Bridge gives MCP clients a persistent session bridge to local OMP and Codex agents. The client opens a delegated-agent session, sends messages into it, polls status/result, can abort active turns, and closes the session when finished. Sessions live inside the MCP server process and are cleaned up when it exits.
defaultPrompt: Open an OMP session and ask for a second pass
Use Codex to investigate this repository
Delegate a task to a local Codex session
Delegate a write-capable fix to OMP
